refined_caption: There is water on the hospital floor and a person is holding an umbrella, indicating a water issue. The floor appears to be wet.
complaint_description: I was visiting my family member on the general ward and noticed that there was a significant amount of water on the floor. It was so wet that someone was even using an umbrella to stay dry. This is a slipping hazard and I'm concerned about the safety of patients and visitors.
voice_text: There's water all over the floor on the general ward, it's so bad someone's using an umbrella
